title: Ubiquiti UDR-5G-Max, UniFi Dream Router 5G Max
description: The Ubiquiti UDR-5G-Max is an all-in-one UniFi tri-band Wi-Fi 7 5G router operating simultaneously in the 2.4GHz, 5GHz and 6GHz bands to achieve a total throughput of up to 10.69Gbps . It is further equipped with (1) SFP+ slot, (4) 2.5G ports (1x PoE), (1) microSD slot for camera recording (preinstalled 64GB card), (2) nano SIM slots and eSIM support (1) SFP+ slot, (4) 2.5Gbps ports (1x PoE), tri-band Wi-Fi 7 Total throughput up to 10.69Gbps - 688Mbps at 2.4GHz (2x2), 4.3Gbps at 5GHz (2x2) and 5.7Gbps at 6GHz (2x2) Multi-WAN with load balancing and 5G/LTE failover (2) nano SIM slots and eSIM support , 5G/4G/3G with up to 3400Mbps downlink and 650Mbps uplink IDS/IPS throughput up to 2.3Gbps VPN support, including site-to-site VPN Supports UniFi Network, Protect, Access, Talk and Connect applications, managing over 30 UniFi devices and more than 300 clients Powered via 54V DC connector Device Patch cable Power adapter 54V/1.1A
specsSearch: Wireless features Maximum modulation 4096 QAM Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 + 6 GHz (triple band), 3G (GSM), 5G (GSM), LTE WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax, 802.11be MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 4300 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Transmission speed - 6GHz [Mb/s] 5700 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Tx power 6GHz [dBm] 22 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 6GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Antenna gain [dBi] 4, 5, 8 Integrated 4G/LTE radio part Yes Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (4) 10/100/1000/2500Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 2 Other features LCD display Power Power type DC connector PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af PoE Out ports 1 PoE budget [W] 15 Max. power consumption [W] 35 Power via connector/terminal 54V / 1,1A Physical characteristics Design Desktop Purpose Indoor Fans No Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 1400 Width [mm] 110 Height [mm] 250 Depth [mm] 110 Hardware CPU ARM Cortex-A53 CPU frequency [MHz] 1500 CPU cores 4 RAM [MB] 3072
